subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Javad
subcodes.first_line: O beloved of My soul and cherished of My spirit! Hast thou chosen repose whilst the Beauty of the All-Glorious dwelleth amidst the wicked? O Javád, the Sovereign Lord of creation declareth: O Javád, unsheathe the sword of thy tongue [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب جان و محبوب روانم آیا سکون اختیار نموده و جمال مختار مابین اشرار... ای جواد سلطان ایجاد میفرماید ای جواد سیف لسانرا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @the power of words; of speech, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
